en: I love the LORD, because he has heard my voice and my pleas for mercy.
zh: 我愛耶和華， 因為他聽了我的聲音、我的懇求。

en: Because he inclined his ear to me, therefore I will call on him as long as I live.
zh: 因為他留心聽我的懇求， 我一生一世要求告他。

en: The snares of death encompassed me; the pangs of Sheol laid hold on me; I suffered distress and anguish.
zh: 死亡的繩索纏繞著我， 陰間的痛苦抓住我； 我遭遇患難和愁苦。

en: Then I called on the name of the LORD: "O LORD, I pray, deliver my soul!"
zh: 那時，我呼求耶和華的名，說： “耶和華啊！求你拯救我。”

en: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; our God is merciful.
zh: 耶和華有恩典，有公義， 我們的 神滿有憐憫。

en: The LORD preserves the simple; when I was brought low, he saved me.
zh: 耶和華保護愚蒙人， 我落到卑微的地步，他拯救了我。

en: Return, O my soul, to your rest; for the LORD has dealt bountifully with you.
zh: 我的心哪！你要回復安寧， 因為耶和華用厚恩待你。

en: For you have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling;
zh: 主啊！你救了我的性命脫離死亡， 你使我的眼睛不致流淚， 使我的雙腳不致跌倒。

en: I will walk before the LORD in the land of the living.
zh: 我要在活人之地， 行在耶和華面前。

en: I believed, even when I spoke, "I am greatly afflicted";
zh: 我雖然說：“我受了極大的痛苦”， 但我仍然相信。

en: I said in my alarm, "All mankind are liars."
zh: 我在驚惶之中曾說： “人都是說謊的。”

en: What shall I render to the LORD for all his benefits to me?
zh: 我拿甚麼報答耶和華向我所施的一切厚恩呢？

en: I will lift up the cup of salvation and call on the name of the LORD,
zh: 我要舉起救恩的杯， 稱揚耶和華的名。

en: I will pay my vows to the LORD in the presence of all his people.
zh: 我要在耶和華的眾民面前， 向他還我所許的願。

en: Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of his saints.
zh: 在耶和華的眼中看來， 聖民的死極為寶貴。

en: O LORD, I am your servant; I am your servant, the son of your maidservant. You have loosed my bonds.
zh: 耶和華啊！我真是你的僕人； 我是你僕人，你婢女的兒子； 我的鎖鍊你給我解開了。

en: I will offer to you the sacrifice of thanksgiving and call on the name of the LORD.
zh: 我要把感恩祭獻給你， 我要稱揚耶和華的名。

en: I will pay my vows to the LORD in the presence of all his people,
zh: 我要在耶和華的眾民面前， 向他還我所許的願。

en: in the courts of the house of the LORD, in your midst, O Jerusalem. Praise the LORD!
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！就是在你的中間， 在耶和華殿的院子裡，我要還我所許的願。 你們要讚美耶和華。
